events.detail: Penalty after Di Maria was fouled. Argentina 1-0 France.
Stunning team move finished by Di Maria. Argentina 2-0 France.
Giroud and Dembele replaced as France search for a response.
Stunning volley. France 2-2 Argentina. Mbappe with a brace in 90 seconds.
Messi taps in from close range in extra time. Argentina 3-2 France.
Mbappe completes his hat-trick from the penalty spot. 3-3. Penalties loom.
Martinez saves Coman's penalty in the shootout.
Montiel scores the winning penalty. Argentina are World Champions.

news_context: Lionel Messi finally won the one trophy that had eluded him, the FIFA World Cup, in what many are calling the greatest final in tournament history.
Kylian Mbappe scored a hat-trick in the final, only the second player ever to do so in a World Cup Final, but it was not enough as Argentina won on penalties.
Argentina's goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez was the hero of the shootout, saving from Kingsley Coman to send a nation into delirium.
